content.full_text:
SAN DIEGO COUNTY YOUNG REPUBLICANS

Education, Action, Leadership

4167 46th Street, San Diego, California 92105


April 11, 1991

Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Department
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Legal Department:

     This letter requests formal written advice on the subject described below pursuant to California Government Code § 83114(b).

     The San Diego County Young Republicans ("SDCYRs") is a county chapter of the California Young Republicans, Inc. a statewide Republican volunteer organization. The SDCYRs plan to hold a fundraiser in June of 1991 (the "EVENT").

     Federal, state, and local legislators will provide some of the printing, stationery, and postage for the EVENT. The funds raised from the EVENT will be used only for SDCYR fundraising expenses, administrative costs, membership mailings, and meeting expenses. The funds raised from the EVENT will not be used to make contributions to federal, state, or local candidates. The funds raised from the EVENT will not be used to support state or local ballot measures, voter registration, get-out-the-vote activities, or sample ballots.

     Based upon the facts set forth above, the SDCYRs ask for advice concerning the following two questions.

     QUESTION #1: Are the donated mailing expenses or the funds raised at the EVENT considered contributions pursuant to the California Government Code?

     QUESTION #2: Will the SDCYRs, or the California Young Republicans, Inc., be required to register and/or report as a "political committee" under the California Government Code?

     Thank you for your time and efforts.

Very truly yours,

Bill Baber

Bill Baber
SDCYRs General Counsel
